steps.title: Use historians' view
steps.content: The text says historians see pachuca style as a form of rebellion against rigid social expectations for women. It also says the style showed a desire for self-expression and freedom among women who adopted it.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A adds a present-day fashion influence that the text never mentions. Choice C says the style showed support for the United States during World War II, which is not stated. Choice D merely compares it with other trends, missing the historians' interpretation.

steps.title: Match rebellion and expression
steps.content: The remaining choice says historians view pachuca style as self-expression and resistance to strict social expectations. The answer is B.
